original_image_tags: Aged, off-white paper document showing three blue ink stamps. The paper has visible wear, including dark holes and a torn corner at the bottom left.

elements.description: Three blue ink FBI stamps on a plain, slightly aged paper background. One stamp reads 'Jul 11 3 23 PM '47 RECEIVED-LADD FBI U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. A second stamp reads 'Jul 11 3 55 PM '47 RECEIVED-LADD FBI U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. A third stamp reads 'RECEIVED JUL 23 1 39 PM '4[illegible] INTERNAL SECURITY F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. There are some dark spots or holes at the bottom edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on three blue ink stamps and dark spots/holes, but Description B adds specific quoted text for each stamp while Description A does not, creating no direct contradiction but a significant detail gap.
